## Summary

What does this PR do and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend changes: ran `npm run typecheck` and relevant `npx vitest run` tests
- [ ] Rust changes: ran `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` and `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] No new credential storage paths introduced (OS keychain only)
- [ ] New migrations added (not edits to existing `.sql` files), if schema changed
- [ ] PR is focused on a single fix or feature
